resources.string: Who we monitor and who we alert
Sensors stay at low rate until significant motion is detected.
Sending SMS alert to your caretaker shortly. Tap cancel if you\'re ok.
We\'ll send a fall alert by SMS to your caretaker with your location.

SafeMotion is not a medical device.

It is a best-effort assistive tool. It will sometimes fail to detect a real fall, and it will sometimes raise a false alert when no fall has occurred.

Do not rely on SafeMotion as your sole means of emergency response. Always have a backup plan: a wearable medical alert, a neighbour you can call, or 112 / your local emergency number.

By tapping I understand you acknowledge:
• The app uses your phone\'s accelerometer, gyroscope, and last-known location.
• When a fall is detected, an SMS containing your name and a Google Maps link will be sent to the caretaker number you configured.
• Standard SMS charges from your carrier may apply.
• All sensor data stays on your phone — see the privacy policy for details.

Android tries to save battery by closing background apps after a while. To make sure SafeMotion can detect a fall even hours after you start it, please allow it to run unrestricted.\n\nWe\'ll take you to the system setting now.
